title: Communauté de communes Isigny-Omaha Intercom
summary: The Communauté de communes Isigny-Omaha Intercom is a communauté de communes, an intercommunal structure, in the Calvados department, in the Normandy region, northwestern France. It was created in January 2017 by the merger of the former communautés de communes Intercom Balleroy Le Molay-Littry, Isigny Grandcamp Intercom and  Trévières. Its area is 581.7 km2, and its population was 26,543 in 2019. Its seat is in Le Molay-Littry.
text:
The Communauté de communes Isigny-Omaha Intercom is a communauté de communes, an intercommunal structure, in the Calvados department, in the Normandy region, northwestern France. It was created in January 2017 by the merger of the former communautés de communes Intercom Balleroy Le Molay-Littry, Isigny Grandcamp Intercom and  Trévières. Its area is 581.7 km2, and its population was 26,543 in 2019. Its seat is in Le Molay-Littry.
